description: Three canonical regular-bail fact patterns. Used by tests/test_drafting_goldens.py to run a validator-only regression when the per-type prompt changes, and by eval_drafting_types.py when a live LLM comparison is run.

facts.grounds_brief: Accused is a resident of Delhi with no prior antecedents. Co-accused Ravi Singh has already been granted bail by this Hon'ble Court on similar facts. Investigation is complete and chargesheet filed.
Accused has been in custody for over 10 months. Prosecution has examined its material witnesses. Trial has not commenced; default bail under Satender Kumar Antil principles attracted.
Allegations are of a matrimonial nature. Complainant is the applicant's wife. The couple is in mediation. Custody no longer serves any investigative purpose.
